options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: goal
options.description:
Default: Beat the final boss with enough data disks collected to win.
Vanilla: Beat the final boss to win.

options.name: required_secret_disks
options.description: Number of Secret Disks required to complete the game

options.name: easy_ex_skill
options.description: Rewards player with EX-Skill at the end of a level regardless of ranking. Currently recommended, as otherwise EXSkills are missable unless you load an earlier save or use savestates. This will be fixed later.

options.name: reward_notification
options.description: Will notify the player of earned Archipelago items. Currently the text is very slow and screen obscuring, so not recommended.

options.name: randomize_weapons
options.description: When enabled, the four weapons (Buster, Z-Saber, Recoil Rod, Shield Boomerang) are added to the item pool and must be found before they can be used.

options.name: starting_weapons
options.description: Which weapons Zero starts with when Randomize Weapons is enabled. Selected weapons are given at the start and will not be placed in the item pool.
